basics.name: Jeroen Wever
basics.title: Freelance staff engineer
basics.summary: Curious, autodidactic engineer with 15+ years of building web products people actually use — from high-traffic news and entertainment platforms to real-time sports betting. I translate abstract ideas into structured processes and UX, take quality as a top priority, and have a clear vision of how a development team should work — and what it takes to make that happen.

experience.summary: Product development on TOTO's casino and sports-betting platforms: high availability, huge traffic spikes, and strict compliance with online gambling legislation.
highlights: Part of the team that rebuilt the entire casino platform on Vue 3, a custom Node.js/Express SSR solution and a .NET backend, hosted in Azure
Helped build TOTO Sport, a real-time sports betting platform, reusing the casino stack to ship faster without sacrificing performance or compliance
Created reusable front-end components across products, set up monitoring and alerting, and integrated user tracking via Google Tag Manager
Integrated the new Winn-It brand into the legacy casino platform and connected third-party APIs

experience.summary: Built and ran high-traffic entertainment products — video, puzzles, casual games, quizzes and podcasts — used across major Dutch media brands such as AD, HLN and de Volkskrant.
highlights: Created front-ends from scratch for products that ran both as standalone destinations and as embeds inside news articles
Implemented advertising, user tracking, paywalls and custom A/B-testing solutions for embeddable products
Owned operations under a "you build it, you run it" principle: containerized hosting in AWS, monitoring and alerting

experience.summary: Led front-end development (75% hands-on, 25% leading) in a fast-paced B2C campaign environment, for clients such as Audi, Renault, Dutch Railways (NS) and the Ministry of Health.
highlights: Defined the common front-end stack and coding standards used across projects and teams
Coached junior and medior developers on their projects and career growth; introduced structure that improved team workflows
Delivered under hard campaign deadlines — including a multilingual Audi site live within four weeks

experience.summary: All-round web development with a strong UX focus: designing, presenting and building business web applications for clients including PostNL, ING, Rijkswaterstaat, KPN, Ziggo and de Persgroep.
highlights: Grew from front-end specialist to full-stack developer and UX designer across dozens of client projects — from news platforms serving 35M pageviews a month to internal portals

items: Translating abstract ideas into structured processes and UX

education.degree: MSc Information Science — Human Centered Multimedia
